basic_details.job_title: ICAR CRRI Young Professional I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: ICAR Central Rice Research Institute (ICAR CRRI) has released the official Young Professional I (YP I) Recruitment Notification 2026 under Advt. No. 15/YP-I/2026-27. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the ICAR CRRI Young Professional I (YP I) Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 21 and 45 years and holding a B.Sc. Agriculture, B.Sc. Environmental Science, or B.Sc. Botany qualification can attend the walk-in interview on 23 July 2026. The official notification PDF and walk-in interview details are available below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation for SC, ST, and OBC candidates as per Government of India norms.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. Agriculture, B.Sc. Environmental Science, B.Sc. Botany
qualification.details: B.Sc. Agriculture B.Sc. Environmental Science B.Sc. Botany

selection_process: Written-cum-Personal Interview Screening Test (if large number of candidates)

content_sections.heading: ICAR CRRI Young Professional I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ICAR CRRI Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ICAR CRRI Young Professional-I (YP-I) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ICAR CRRI Young Professional-I (YP-I) Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: ICAR CRRI Young Professional I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ICAR CRRI Young Professional-I posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Young Professional-I posts at ICAR CRRI is scheduled for 23rd July 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Young Professional-I position?
faq.answer: The required educational qualifications are B.Sc. in Agriculture, Environmental Science, or Botany. Candidates must possess one of these degrees to be eligible.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Young Professional-I role?
faq.answer: The age limit for this position is between 21 years and 45 years. Age relaxations are applicable for SC, ST, and OBC candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How much is the salary offered for the Young Professional-I post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000 per month for the Young Professional-I position.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General, OBC, SC, ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Young Professional-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written-cum-Personal Interview. A screening test may be conducted if there is a large number of applicants.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, and self-attested photocopies. Also, bring category certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the ICAR Central Rice Research Institute located?
faq.answer: ICAR Central Rice Research Institute is located in Cuttack, Odisha. The specific address for the walk-in interview will be detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, the Young Professional-I position is a contractual job. The duration of the contract will be specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 15/YP-I/2026-27. This number should be referenced in any communication or application.
